title: Critical Thinking In Problem Solving & Decision Making
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable workplace effectiveness workshop for strengthening critical thinking in problem solving & decision making.
whyThisMatters: Critical Thinking In Problem Solving & Decision Making helps employees and supervisors strengthen critical thinking in problem solving & decision making through clearer communication, practical tools, and better everyday work habits. Participants explore Problem solving techniques, Create depth in the thinking process, and Implementation and monitoring so the learning can be translated into immediate action at work.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: Create depth in the thinking process
Tool \#7: 3D Action Planning and Tool \#8: Considerations, Pros & Cons

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Critical Thinking In Problem Solving & Decision Making.md
